examples: He had always had his moments of quiet introspection.
What we seem to be sacrificing in all our surfing and searching is our capacity to engage in the quieter, attentive modes of thought that underpin contemplation, reflection and introspection.
She's a woman who just skims the surface of life, preferring a thin facade to introspection.
But if you think that time was used for thoughtful introspection, you just don't know Hollywood.
